market_data.headline: Tesla SEC Form 8-K: Surprise Gigafactory Announcement
market_data.content: Tesla has officially filed an 8-K with the SEC announcing the immediate construction of three new automated Gigafactories in Southeast Asia, projected to double global output.

market_data.headline: Apple Supply Chain Bottleneck
market_data.content: A sudden shortage of rare earth metals has delayed the production of the new iPhone by 3 months.
